case_title: JOSEPH J. MARQUEZ VS. NEW RESTAURANT GROUP, LP

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS CONTINUED FROM OCT-24-2016 TO NOV-22-2016, AT 9:30 A.M., IN DEPARTMENT 302 PER THE AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976. (302/H
PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER MARQUEZ, JOSEPH J. AS TO RESPONDENT NEW RESTAURANT GROUP, LP JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER MARQUEZ, JOSEPH J. RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT NEW RESTAURANT GROUP, LP $23,363.78 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $23,363.78, SEE SCANNED DOC

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER JOSEPH MARQUEZ'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO BEING RE-FILED. PETITIONER DID NOT FILE A PROOF OF SERVICE OF THE RESPONDENT. THE MOVING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER THAT TRACKS THE TENTATIVE RULING VERBATIM. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Nov-22-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Petitioner Joseph Marquez's petition to confirm arbitration award is granted. No opposition filed. The moving party is to provide a form of order that tracks the tentative ruling verbatim.

Judge: Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. (302/JQ)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Oct-24-2016 Continued To Nov-22-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

PETITIONER JOSEPH MARQUEZ'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is continued to November 22, 2016 at 9:30 a.m., in Department 302 per the agreement of the parties.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Aw Ard
Off Calendar Jun-15-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. PETITIONER JOSEPH MARQUEZ'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is denied without prejudice to being re-filed. Petitioner did not file a proof of service of the respondent. The moving party is to prepare a form of order that tracks the tentative ruling verbatim.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
